title: KIDS COURSE FINAL: My adventure
description: The final exam — 50 WPM on a complete adventure story. Pass earns the Kids Mastery certificate!
text: Once there was a brave little kid who wanted to learn to type. They started with just one letter. Then two. Then ten. Then they could write stories, ask questions, and count to a hundred! After 50 lessons, they earned the title of Real Typist. That brave kid is YOU. Yay!
